name: readBusinessMessage
description: Marks incoming message as read on behalf of a business account. Requires the can_read_messages business bot right

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which to read the message

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the chat in which the message was received. The chat must have been active in the last 24 hours.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the message to mark as read
